endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all Log Analytics QueryPacks within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Log Analytics QueryPacks within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}
endpoints.description: Creates (or updates) a Log Analytics QueryPack. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/queryPacks/{queryPackName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing QueryPack's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{QUERYPACKNAME}} with a real querypackname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
